level_signals: 4+ years experience in a consumer facing product management role
At least 1 year of shipping crypto products
Base pay Zone 1 $217K–$255K, consistent with Senior PM level

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4+ years experience in a consumer facing product management role
At least 1 year of shipping crypto products
Familiarity using research, experimentation and product analytics to guide decision making
Ability to balance strategic with creative decision making
A strong sense of urgency and speed
High standards and a strong work ethic - you always bring your best and expect your colleagues to do the same
Delight in bringing innovation and impact to customers, particularly in complex and dynamic environments

scope.surface: Crypto trading product — trading UX, advanced order types, exchange integrations, smart order routing, liquidity partnerships, CeDeFi / DeFi-powered experiences, staking
scope.business_model: consumer fintech / retail brokerage with crypto capabilities, B2C
primary_metrics_inferred: Adoption of advanced trading features by sophisticated/professional traders
CeDeFi product adoption and onchain activity
core_responsibilities: Define and drive the strategy to make Robinhood the leading platform for sophisticated and professional crypto traders
Lead cross-functional teams to identify high-impact opportunities across trading UX, execution quality, liquidity access, and market structure
Ship advanced trading capabilities, exchange integrations, and routing improvements
Build and scale crypto-native CeDeFi experiences — embedding onchain products, staking, and DeFi-powered functionality into the Robinhood app
Use research, experimentation, and product analytics to inform decisions and continuously improve trading outcomes
Deliver high-quality products with speed and rigor in a fast-moving, highly dynamic market environment

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as part of total compensation alongside bonus

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed across three pay zones — Zone 1 $217K–$255K base
Equity and bonus mentioned on top of base pay
Clear product surface and ownership area (crypto trading, CeDeFi, DeFi-powered features)
Comprehensive benefits: 100% paid health insurance, mental health support, parental leave, fertility benefits
Mission-driven company at the intersection of consumer finance and crypto
red_flags: Hybrid requirement of at least 3 days/week in Menlo Park or NYC only — no remote option
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed in JD
Hard 1-year crypto shipping requirement may be difficult to mitigate without direct crypto PM experience
'Experience in Crypto products' listed twice (once as 'At least 1 year of shipping crypto products' and once as 'Experience in Crypto products') — some redundancy but suggests this is a firm emphasis

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range and role title)
seniority.manages_people (not stated; inferred false from IC-level framing)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not in JD)
location.work_auth and location.visa_sponsorship (not stated in JD)
ambiguities: 'Experience in Crypto products' appears both as a standalone bullet and implicitly covered by '1 year of shipping crypto products' — treated as separate requirements given different phrasing, but may be the same intent

All listed must-haves appear in an undifferentiated 'What you bring' section with no explicit 'required' vs 'preferred' separation — all treated as hard per schema rules; no nice-to-haves were explicitly marked as preferred or bonus in the JD
